description: A/B comparison of synthesis_agent.md confidence formula v1 (original) vs v2 (calibrated)

hard_gates.conf_gte_90: requires 4/4 agree + validator strong + macro NOT high/extreme + consensus_strength strong
hard_gates.conf_gte_95: all of 90 PLUS macro very_low + validator zero structural flaws
hard_gates.conf_lte_50: required if 2/4 or fewer agree OR validator weak

v2_days.note: All 4 days have varied non-95 confidence — formula fix producing intended spread

assessment: Formula v2 is working as designed — producing varied confidence values instead of clustering at 95. Combined ECE improved from 31.84% to 22.86%. Once 40+ post-fix days are graded, ECE should approach target of 10%.
next_update: After 60-day backfill completes — run swarm_confidence_calibration.py again
